descriptions.text: Puma Street Soccer is a PC street soccer game. The goal of the game: two teams of 4 players compete on mini-fields delimited by barriers. These barriers are an integral part of the game and can be used in particular to make a "one-two" or to dribble an opponent.
This is a continued list of games for the Sony PlayStation video game system, organized alphabetically by name. There are often different names for the same game in different regions.
